DISCOVERY 302, PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS CONTINUED TO JUNE 22, 2012 TO BE HEARD AT 9:30 A.M. ON THE LAW AND MOTION CALENDAR. THE MATTER WAS MIS-CALENDARED ON THE DISCOVERY CALENDAR. IN ADDITION, ALL PARTIES ARE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THEIR PAPERS PER SAN FRANCISCO LOCAL RULE 2.6B WITH A COVER LETTER REFLECTING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN JUNE 18, 2012 AT 4:00 PM. JUDGE PRO TEM REBECCA WOODSON, NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-22-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court ruled as follows:
PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC.'S Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption -
THE JUDGMENT DEBTOR'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED, SUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT FUNDS ARE EXEMPTED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Harold Kahn; Court Reporter: Joanne Bryce, CSR # 3321 = (302/HEK)

Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-15-2012 Continued To Jun-22-12 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF MIDLAND FUNDING LLC'S HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION is continued to June 22, 2012 to be heard at 9:30 a.m. on the law and motion calendar. The matter was mis-calendared on the Discovery Calendar. In addition, all parties are to provide courtesy copies of their papers per San Francisco Local Rule 2.6B with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date to Department 302 no later than June 18, 2012 at 4:00 pm.

JUDGE PRO TEM REBECCA WOODSON, NOT REPORTED.
